text:
Created attachment 164641
update to 3.0.6, unbreak

Hello,

attached a patch to unbreak the port with an update to the current version 3.0.6.

portlint is fine. poudriere builds are fine on i386, amd64 for FreeBSD 9.3, 10.1, 10.2 and current.

Greetings,
Torsten
